final_prompt.prompt:
Design a brand color + secondary color + typography specification sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and seasonal botanicals.

Style/medium: brand identity specification sheet with the meditative stillness of Japanese craft documentation, designed for internal brand guidelines or investor presentation
Composition: clean vertical layout with three distinct zones — primary color swatch at top, secondary palette grid in middle, typography specimen at bottom, generous breathing room between sections
Subject: 染秋 brand color system: primary color derived from persimmon dusk and amber maple, secondary palette including osmanthus gold, oolong tea brown, cinnamon warmth, sandalwood depth; typography showing brand name in both Chinese 染秋 and English RAN QIU with specimen weights
Scene/backdrop: minimal studio environment, the colors floating as if on handmade washi paper
Lighting/mood: the warm honey light of late autumn afternoon, a quiet reverence for the changing season
Color palette: persimmon amber as anchor, osmanthus gold and oolong brown in conversation, cinnamon and sandalwood providing depth, all speaking the language of Eastern autumn
Materials/textures: the matte warmth of uncoated paper, ink sitting quietly on the surface, the gentle tooth of washi
Text (verbatim): 染秋 / RAN QIU / 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
Constraints: clear color values (hex or Pantone references implied), Chinese and English typography shown together, botanical inspiration visible in color naming
Avoid: Western corporate palette clichés, neon or synthetic colors, cluttered layout, missing the Eastern philosophical anchor
